2017- curatorialmuseumcollaboration

Curator for Creative Collaboration

Between 2017-2022 I served as the Inaugural Curator for Creative Collaboration at the Weisman Art Museum of the University of Minnesota Twin Cities. See this document for the description of five selected projects I curated and this interview for a brief summary of my work there. .
